Asbestos Corporation Ltd.'S Joinder In Co-Defendant Sb Decking, Inc.'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action For Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Apr-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED Asbestos Corporation Ltd.'s Joinder In Co-Defendant SB Decking, Inc.'s Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action For Forum Non Conveniens. Appearances: Andrew Chew, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLC, (415) 898-1555.Matthew A. Hickey, Esq. of Wilson Elser (415) 433-0990, appearing for Defendant Asbestos Corporation Ltm., and moving party. Plaintiff's counsel reports to the Court that the Plaintiff is now deceased. The Court vacates its tentative ruling. Motion is ruled off calendar, without prejudice, to be re-filed once a substitution is filed. (302KOPP)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
